_comment: Terminal cosmetic skins (Phase E). 'Neon' is always owned; the other five unlock via a badge, a region reached, mythic ownership, or prestige. See engine/skins.py for the unlock-check pipeline and models/skin.py for field docs.

skins.name: Neon
skins.flavor: The default DevMon look -- cyan and magenta, always on.

skins.name: Monochrome Terminal
skins.flavor: Green-on-black, exactly like the terminal that started it all.

skins.name: Solarized Abyss
skins.flavor: The muted, low-light palette of a system that never sees daylight.

skins.name: Voidwave
skins.flavor: Static bleeding in from beyond the routing table.

skins.name: Root Access
skins.flavor: Every permission bit set. Nothing left to sudo.

skins.name: Prestige Gold
skins.flavor: Gold trim for a trainer who has done this all before.
